Page.$description: Background color of the page root. Apply to the body or top-level layout wrapper. The lowest layer in the surface hierarchy.

Primary.$description: Default background for elevated surfaces: cards, modals, dialogs, and sidesheets. Sits one level above Surface/Page.

Secondary.$description: Warm off-white background (Sand/50) for low-emphasis surfaces. Use for tags, pills, badges, segmented control inactive state, and inset sections that need warmth against Surface/Primary.

Inverse.$description: Strongly contrasted surface for inverted sections (dark headers, footers, hero sections). Mirrors Surface/Primary across modes. Always pair with Content/Inversed.

Primary Hover.$description: Hover state background for interactive surfaces that use Surface/Primary as their base (list rows, table cells, menu items).

Secondary Hover.$description: Hover state background for interactive elements that use Surface/Secondary as their base (clickable tags, pills, badges). Uses Sand/200 for sufficient contrast against Sand/50.

Overlay.$description: Semi-transparent scrim applied behind modals, drawers, and bottom sheets to dim and isolate background content.

Brand.$description: Solid brand-colored surface. Use for filled brand badges, highlighted sections, or brand-accented containers.

Brand Light.$description: Tinted brand surface for low-emphasis elements. Use for brand-colored badges, tags, chips, and subtle highlights.

Brand Dark.$description: Tinted brand surface for low-emphasis elements. Use for brand-colored badges, tags, chips, and subtle highlights.

Default.$description: Primary text and icon color. Use for all body copy, headings, and labels on light surfaces.

Inversed.$description: Text and icon color for content placed on Surface/Inverse or any dark/filled surface. Always pair with Surface/Inverse.

Weak.$description: Subdued text and icon color for secondary information on light surfaces. Use for metadata, captions, placeholders, and helper text.

Weak Inversed.$description: Subdued text and icon color for secondary information on dark or filled surfaces. Use for metadata and captions on Surface/Inverse.

Default.$description: Standard border color for components requiring a visible stroke (cards, inputs, containers, dividers between major sections).

Weak.$description: Subtle separator color for low-emphasis structural lines. Use for dividers between list items or inner content sections.

Brand.$description: Brand-colored border indicating selected, focused, or active state. Use on inputs, tabs, cards, and any component requiring a brand-accented stroke.

Danger.$description: Error state border color. Use on inputs, fields, or components in a validation error state.

BG.$description: Primary brand background for interactive elements. Use as the default fill for primary buttons and main CTAs.

BG Subtle.$description: Light brand background (Blue/50) for hover state of Ghost and Outline buttons.

BG Hover.$description: Hover state background for primary brand interactive elements. Replaces Interactive/BG on hover.

Content.$description: Brand-colored text and icon. Use for ghost button labels, outline button labels, and inline links.

Border.$description: Brand-colored border for outlined and ghost interactive elements.

Disabled BG.$description: Background color for disabled interactive elements. Indicates a non-interactable state.

Disabled Content.$description: Text and icon color for disabled interactive elements (buttons, inputs).

Alpha BG.$description: Semi-transparent background with blur support. Use for buttons overlaid on images or blurred surfaces.

Alpha BG Hover.$description: Hover variant of Alpha BG. Slightly more opaque, for the hovered state of transparent/blur buttons.

Danger BG.$description: Destructive action background (Red/50). Use as the fill for danger Ghost and Outline buttons, and error-state highlighted rows.

Danger BG Hover.$description: Hover state for danger Ghost and Outline buttons (Red/100). Replaces Interactive/Danger BG on hover.

Danger Content.$description: Text and icon color for destructive actions. Use for danger button labels, error links, and critical action text.

BG.$description: Solid green background for success states. Use for filled success badges and toast icon fills.

BG Light.$description: Tinted green background for success inline alerts, banners, and tags.

Content.$description: Text and icon color for success messages. Use on Success/BG Light surfaces.

BG.$description: Solid red background for error states. Use for filled error badges and toast icon fills.

BG Light.$description: Tinted red background for error inline alerts, banners, and tags.

Content.$description: Text and icon color for error messages. Use on Danger/BG Light surfaces.

BG.$description: Solid amber background for warning states. Use for filled warning badges and toast icon fills.

BG Light.$description: Tinted amber background for warning inline alerts, banners, and tags.

Content.$description: Text and icon color for warning messages. Use on Warning/BG Light surfaces.

BG.$description: Solid blue background for informational states. Use for filled info badges and toast icon fills.

BG Light.$description: Tinted blue background for informational inline alerts, banners, and tags.

Content.$description: Text and icon color for informational messages. Use on Info/BG Light surfaces.

BG.$description: Solid background for Promo category labels and badges. Value set per client.

BG Light.$description: Tinted background for Promo category chips, tags, and inline indicators. Value set per client.

Content.$description: Text and icon color for Promo category labels. Use on Promo/BG Light surfaces.

BG.$description: Solid background for New category labels and badges. Value set per client.

BG Light.$description: Tinted background for New category chips, tags, and inline indicators. Value set per client.

Content.$description: Text and icon color for New category labels. Use on New/BG Light surfaces.

BG.$description: Solid background for Healthy category labels and badges. Value set per client.

BG Light.$description: Tinted background for Healthy category chips, tags, and inline indicators. Value set per client.

Content.$description: Text and icon color for Healthy category labels. Use on Healthy/BG Light surfaces.

BG.$description: Solid background for Express category labels and badges. Value set per client.

BG Light.$description: Tinted background for Express category chips, tags, and inline indicators. Value set per client.

Content.$description: Text and icon color for Express category labels. Use on Express/BG Light surfaces.

BG.$description: Solid background for Low Cost category labels and badges. Value set per client.

BG Light.$description: Tinted background for Low Cost category chips, tags, and inline indicators. Value set per client.

Content.$description: Text and icon color for Low Cost category labels. Use on Low Cost/BG Light surfaces.

2.$description: 4px — Extra-small spacing. Use for tight gaps between inline elements or icon padding.

4.$description: 4px — Extra-small spacing. Use for tight gaps between inline elements or icon padding.

8.$description: 8px — Small spacing. Use for compact padding within components (chips, badges, small inputs).

12.$description: 12px — Small-medium spacing. Use for padding in compact components or vertical rhythm between related items.

16.$description: 16px — Base spacing. Default padding for most components (cards, inputs, buttons).

20.$description: 20px — Medium spacing. Use for internal padding in larger components or gap between grouped elements.

24.$description: 24px — Large spacing. Use for section padding or gap between distinct component groups.

32.$description: 32px — Extra-large spacing. Use for major layout padding or vertical space between page sections.

40.$description: 40px — 2XL spacing. Use for generous layout padding on desktop views.

48.$description: 48px — 3XL spacing. Use for hero sections, large module spacing, or page-level vertical rhythm.

Button.$description: Border radius for buttons and primary interactive controls.

Input.$description: Border radius for text inputs, selects, and form fields.

Card.$description: Border radius for cards, panels, and content containers.

Sheet.$description: Border radius for bottom sheets and drawers (typically applied to top corners only).

Tag.$description: Border radius for tags, chips, and small label components.

Square.$description: Border radius for square icon containers, avatars, and thumbnail frames.

Pill.$description: Full pill border radius. Use for pill-shaped badges, toggles, and fully rounded buttons.
